p : Γ' → Bool

h₂ : S rev = []

⊢ Reaches₁ (TM2.step tr) { l := some (move₂ p k₁ k₂ q), var := s, stk := S }
    { l := some q, var := none, stk := update (update S k₁ (o.elim id List.cons L₂)) k₂ (L₁ ++ S k₂) }

    | a :: as =>

    (L₁, o, L₂)
⊢ Reaches₁ (TM2.step tr) { l := some (move₂ p k₁ k₂ q), var := s, stk := S }

E : Type u_1
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
n : ℕ
_i : Fact (finrank ℝ E = n)
o : Orientation ℝ E (Fin n)
F : Type u_2
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup F
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℝ F
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ F = n)
φ : E ≃ₗᵢ[ℝ] F
x : Fin n → F
⊢ (Nat.casesAuxOn (motive := fun a => n = a → F [⋀^Fin n]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ) n
        (fun h =>
          Eq.rec (motive := fun x x_1 => [_i : Fact (finrank ℝ F = x)] → Orientation ℝ F (Fin x) → F [⋀^Fin x]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ)
            (fun [Fact (finrank ℝ F = 0)] o =>
              ⋯.by_cases (fun x => AlternatingMap.constOfIsEmpty ℝ F (Fin 0) 1) fun x =>
                -AlternatingMap.constOfIsEmpty ℝ F (Fin 0) 1)
            ⋯ ((map (Fin n) φ.toLinearEquiv) o))
        (fun n_1 h =>
          Eq.rec (motive := fun x x_1 => [_i : Fact (finrank ℝ F = x)] → Orientation ℝ F (Fin x) → F [⋀^Fin x]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ)
            (fun [Fact (finrank ℝ F = n_1 + 1)] o => (Orientation.finOrthonormalBasis ⋯ ⋯ o).toBasis.det) ⋯
            ((map (Fin n) φ.toLinearEquiv) o))
        ⋯)
      x =
    (Nat.casesAuxOn (motive := fun a => n = a → E [⋀^Fin n]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ) n
        (fun h =>
          Eq.rec (motive := fun x x_1 => [_i : Fact (finrank ℝ E = x)] → Orientation ℝ E (Fin x) → E [⋀^Fin x]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ)
            (fun [Fact (finrank ℝ E = 0)] o =>
              ⋯.by_cases (fun x => AlternatingMap.constOfIsEmpty ℝ E (Fin 0) 1) fun x =>
                -AlternatingMap.constOfIsEmpty ℝ E (Fin 0) 1)
            ⋯ o)
        (fun n_1 h =>
          Eq.rec (motive := fun x x_1 => [_i : Fact (finrank ℝ E = x)] → Orientation ℝ E (Fin x) → E [⋀^Fin x]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ)
            (fun [Fact (finrank ℝ E = n_1 + 1)] o => (Orientation.finOrthonormalBasis ⋯ ⋯ o).toBasis.det) ⋯ o)
        ⋯)
      (⇑φ.symm ∘ x)

E : Type u_1
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
n : ℕ
_i : Fact (finrank ℝ E = n)
o : Orientation ℝ E (Fin n)
F : Type u_2
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup F
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℝ F
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ F = n)
φ : E ≃ₗᵢ[ℝ] F
x : Fin n → F
⊢ (Nat.casesAuxOn (motive := fun a => n = a → F [⋀^Fin n]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ) n
        (fun h =>
          Eq.ndrec (motive := fun {n} => [_i : Fact (finrank ℝ F = n)] → Orientation ℝ F (Fin n) → F [⋀^Fin n]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ)
            (fun [Fact (finrank ℝ F = 0)] o =>
              let opos := AlternatingMap.constOfIsEmpty ℝ F (Fin 0) 1;
              ⋯.by_cases (fun x => opos) fun x => -opos)
            ⋯ ((map (Fin n) φ.toLinearEquiv) o))
        (fun n_1 h =>
          Eq.ndrec (motive := fun {n} => [_i : Fact (finrank ℝ F = n)] → Orientation ℝ F (Fin n) → F [⋀^Fin n]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ)
            (fun [Fact (finrank ℝ F = n_1 + 1)] o => (Orientation.finOrthonormalBasis ⋯ ⋯ o).toBasis.det) ⋯
            ((map (Fin n) φ.toLinearEquiv) o))
        ⋯)
      x =
    o.volumeForm (⇑φ.symm ∘ x)
